codeReview.summary: The fix addresses both previously blocking regressions. Keyless supplier auto-settle now resolves the allocation set before deriving fallback reference/idempotency, and supplier auto-settle ordering is now backed by persisted purchase due dates plus repository ordering of due date, invoice date, then ID. I did not find new blocking issues in the reviewed diff/HEAD state.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the latest transcript skeleton, handoff, and HEAD commit 21923cbccf798526cdd84ddb4d4ef27b0a0d7289. The prior keyless auto-settle identity bug is fixed in SupplierSettlementService, and the due-date-first ordering gap is fixed through RawMaterialPurchase due-date persistence, migration/backfill, repository ordering, and focused regression coverage.
